chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No. D — 2329 of 2019. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE[s] 30.03.2022 FOR ORDERS AS TO NON-PROSECUTION. Mr. Mian Taj Muhammad Keerio Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri, A.A.G. Sindh. ------ After detailed arguments in respect of the maintainability of this petition as it pertains to implementation of the order by two authorities i.e. District Education Officer and Director School Education (Primary), learned counsel submits that he would pursue his remedy before the concerned court having jurisdiction in this regard for the implementation of the order. The petition being misconceived is dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE A.
